must_detect.matched_text: Deal Codename: Project Lotus; definitive agreement: Share Subscription Agreement (SSA) and Investor Rights Agreement, draft status, not yet disclosed under the Securities and Exchange Act (SEA).
Purpose: processing PII (as defined under the PDPA) of employees, directors, and prospective investors to evaluate financing of THB 480,000,000 for 12.5% new shares in Siam Futura PCL.
Retention: board memos, term sheets, investor-relations drafts, and deal checklists retained 10 years from closing; HR files 7 years from termination; research notes 3 years.
Ms. Pranee Vongchai, DPO of Siam Futura PCL, confirms that the non-public IR draft will be finalized after embargo; Mr. Krit Chaisuwan (CFO) is the contact for financing queries.

CONFIDENTIAL—Non-public PDPA notice and DPA rider for Siam Futura Public Company Limited (PCL); Embargoed until 2026-07-15 09:00 ICT.
Deal Codename: Project Lotus; definitive agreement: Share Subscription Agreement (SSA) and Investor Rights Agreement, draft status, not yet disclosed under the Securities and Exchange Act (SEA).
Purpose: processing PII (as defined under the PDPA) of employees, directors, and prospective investors to evaluate financing of THB 480,000,000 for 12.5% new shares in Siam Futura PCL.
Lawful bases: contract performance, legal obligation under Thai securities law, legitimate interests in listing compliance; consent collected for cross-border HR analytics.
Transfers: personal data may be transferred to processors CloudMango Pte. Ltd. (SG) and NikkoByte KK (JP) under binding corporate rules and data transfer agreements meeting PDPA Section 28 standards; contact privacy@siamfutura.co.th.
Retention: board memos, term sheets, investor-relations drafts, and deal checklists retained 10 years from closing; HR files 7 years from termination; research notes 3 years.
Data subject rights: access, correction, erasure, portability, objection, and withdrawal of consent; submit DSARs to dsar@siamfutura.co.th or +66-2100-9944.
Security: encryption at rest and in transit, role-based access, and logging; documents marked MNPI are restricted until public filing on the Thai exchange is completed.
Condition precedent: no Material Adverse Effect (MAE) shall have occurred; for clarity, changes in general economic or TFRS conditions alone do not constitute an MAE.
This internal notice does not authorize trading and is not an immediate disclosure; public information cited includes the 2023 Khlong Institute industry outlook.
Ms. Pranee Vongchai, DPO of Siam Futura PCL, confirms that the non-public IR draft will be finalized after embargo; Mr. Krit Chaisuwan (CFO) is the contact for financing queries.
Data map: employee payroll, option allocations, and board contact lists are processed in Bangkok and mirrored in Singapore; backups deleted 90 days post-embargo, production 10 years.
Lowercase ops note: todo: update annex c, move ssa to folder, link research note, and ping external counsel via counsel@nikkomerchant.law.
Wellness reminder: spa-day vouchers available on friday for staff; unrelated to processing activities and not a signal for disclosure timing.
Compliance with the Securities and Exchange Act of Thailand and exchange rules is maintained, but nothing herein is a public filing or constitutes material public information.
If closing is delayed, the parties agree to extend long-stop date to 2026-08-31 without waiving any rights, and this shall not be treated as a MAC or announcement trigger.
